creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
For example, I also maintain a similar port: www/yt-dlp that is only a program.

There's no need for users to have a choice of py39-yt-dlp, py310-yt-dlp, pyu311-yt-dlp.

Prefix becomes a confusing technicality, and isn't needed in such cases. It can only cause confusion among users.
